turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what brings Mrs. Anderson here today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi , doctor . um , Mrs. Anderson is having this left shoulder pain lately , uh , and the left shoulder pain is paining a lot .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . hey , dragon . the doctor is seeing mrs. anderson , a 44-years-old female , uh , complaining to check the left shoulder pain . um , so how long how has the left shoulder pain lasted ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the left shoulder pain has been a week , doctor . yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , did Mrs. Anderson take any medication herself ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , Mrs. Anderson did not take any pain medications . actually , Mrs. Anderson did . Mrs. Anderson did take a tylenol for two or three days , but then tylenol did n't help at all . so , uh , the reason why the left shoulder pain started or when the left shoulder pain started to happen is-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: . Mrs. Anderson was actually in gymnastics class .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and , uh , Mrs. Anderson do n't know . maybe Mrs. Anderson must have toppled over into some weird position , so the left shoulder pain started to pain since then , uh , because of a certain move .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Mrs. Anderson went overboard , Mrs. Anderson think . yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , lem the doctor , uh , take a quick look . uh , can Mrs. Anderson move up a little bit ? yeah .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , yeah . in fact , moving up a little bit hurts .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does moving up a little bit- does moving up a little bit hurt ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , moving up a little bit does .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what if Mrs. Anderson move back a little bit ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , moving back a little bit also hurts , doctor .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: any kind of movement on Mrs. Anderson's left shoulder actually hurts .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , um , so let's ... hey , dragon . show the doctor the last x-ray . all right , from the x-ray , the x-ray does n't look like there is any , uh , broken bone or fracture . the doctor's guess is Mrs. Anderson probably , um , hurt Mrs. Anderson's joint , uh-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the doctor would , uh , suggest Mrs. Anderson continue using the pain reliever , maybe just like 600 milligram of ibuprofen three times a day and use ibuprofen for a week .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then if Mrs. Anderson ... if the left shoulder pain is still painful , Mrs. Anderson can use , uh , ice or , um , heat pad-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . 'cause ice or a heat pad might help relieve Mrs. Anderson's pain .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: but Mrs. Anderson wanted the doctor to know that Mrs. Anderson did have past surgery on Mrs. Anderson's , um , left arm-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: . so , um , Mrs. Anderson hope that the past surgery on Mrs. Anderson's left arm should n't matter , right ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , the past surgery on Mrs. Anderson's left arm does n't seem related to Mrs. Anderson's pain .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so ... but the doctor would try to rest Mrs. Anderson's left arm-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . while Mrs. Anderson's left arm is healing .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: can Mrs. Anderson , uh , carry any heavy weights or-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . for the next , uh , at least just three to four weeks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , come back to see the doctor if the pain , you know , still there after maybe three weeks-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . so the doctor can take a further look .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: but Mrs. Anderson should be fine-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . after just resting and regular pain reliever .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: should Mrs. Anderson take another x-ray when Mrs. Anderson come back , if the pain does n't improve ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , maybe . let's see how Mrs. Anderson is doing in the next three weeks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . um , order medications and procedures as discussed . all right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , the doctor think that's good for today . hope Mrs. Anderson feel better soon .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hopefully , the pain reliever , uh , ibuprofen actually helps .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , and if Mrs. Anderson have more pain , can Mrs. Anderson call the doctor ? can Mrs. Anderson fix up another appointment earlier than three weeks ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , Mrs. Anderson can also try advil .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: ale- , aleve . the doctor mean , aleve .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Mrs. Anderson see . okay , thank you , doctor .
